title: High CAGR
author: Moist_Piece874
selftext: Hi guys! I made this open source script on tradingview. It has high cagr and low risk. You can edit the script and apply however much leverage you would like to use, 4-5x leverage returns 70-100% cagr which is insane. With 2-3x leverage you'll have cagr between 30-40% with lower drawdowns if you prefer that path or even using no leverage, you still beat bitcoin with an extremely low max drawdown. NOTE: works best on the 4 hour time frame. Also this trades on BTC/USD
